pokemon:greedent.name: Greedent
pokemon:greedent.summary: Common throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon has strong teeth and can chew through the toughest of berry shells.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Common throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon has strong teeth and can chew through the toughest of berry shells.
It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn’t notice the loss.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Common throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon has strong teeth and can chew through the toughest of berry shells.

pokemon:skwovet.name: Skwovet
pokemon:skwovet.summary: It eats berries nonstop—a habit that has made it more resilient than it looks. It’ll show up on farms, searching for yet more berries.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It eats berries nonstop—a habit that has made it more resilient than it looks. It’ll show up on farms, searching for yet more berries.
Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It eats berries nonstop—a habit that has made it more resilient than it looks. It’ll show up on farms, searching for yet more berries.
